features: 【French Tip False Nails】:24 pieces of light pink glitter press on nails look charming and elegant for your daily styles and date nights.15 different sizes of french stick on nails can meet all your needs for nail decoration and make your nails glamorous
【Long Lasting for 15+ Days】:French fake nails with glue is very sturdy, waterproof and not easy to peel off, allowing french manicure false nails to last 1-3 weeks, and 3-5 days with jelly stickers

【Full Cover Nail Tips】:The stick on nails are perfect length, thicker design on the top, shallower edge on the bottom, slightly curved, which can fit perfectly with real nails, not easy to break and won't hurt your nails

【Easy to Use】:Just gently polish your nails, file the sides and cuticle area with a nail file and clean the dust.Select the right size of medium oval nail tips for each nail, and apply glue on nails, then press on them for 25s until it is secure

【Widely Application】:Our natural stick on nails are suitable for parties, dates, and easily matched with makeup, clothes and accessories, suitable for various occasions, making you a striking person in various occasions
description: Features: 1. Easy to use, bueatiful decoration and long lasting make you nails look much more glamorous and beautiful 2. Design your own nails for wedding, party or weekend dating, stylish choice for your nail fashion 3. A wonderful choice for yourself or your female friend 4. Safety on your natural nails, environmental protection, do not hurt the hand. False nail trips without the dangerous chemical process 5. Full nail design, practical length, makes your nails slim and has a very realistic or at least professional look 6. Beautiful, simple, atmosphere, suitable for all kinds of occupation Package Contents: 1. 24Pcs false nails 2. 1 Small stick of glue (2g) 3. 1 Sheet of Jelly Sticker 4. 1 Mini Nail File 5. 1 Wooden Stick 6. 1 Wet Pad How to Use? Step1: Remove the cuticle with nail tool Step2: Clear nails and keep the nails dry Step3: Apply glue on fake nails Step4: Press on and hold for 10 seconds Step5: Finish How to Remove? Step1: Soak your nails in warm water for 10-15 minutes (You can also wrap your nails in nail polish remover for 3 minutes) Step2: Lift the fake nails from the edge with the small wooden stick; And clean the glue on the false nails for next use
